race.comment: LONTRICE (2) found the 1300m too short first-up in the soft (7) going with a plugging fourth at Randwick Kensington. Expected to relish the 1600m and gets map favours from the low gate. Ready to get off the mark. ALMAAZ (3) struck a bit of trouble early and was never comfortable on the tight Wyong track when third over 1625m. At her top now and no excuses today. IRON LEGEND (7) placed here first-up and will keep improving as he gets out in trip. Covered a stack of ground in the run when sixth over 1625m at Wyong. Kept up to the mark with a 1030m tick over trial and not without each way prospects. WORMINGTON (6) just over three weeks between runs when he gripped on late to finish second over 1600m at this track. Fitter now and well placed with the claim. The chances don't end there.
